description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house set on a grassy plot with a paved driveway and surrounded by several large, leafy trees. The house features a flat roof and a mix of large and small windows, with some wooden shutters and a combination of light-colored exterior walls. The front entryway is defined by a simple, flat path leading to a recessed door, and the landscaping includes bushes and shrubs along the perimeter. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating a stepped profile. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms, typical of contemporary suburban architecture.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist landscaping, surrounded by trees and a grassy yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and two prominent trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the paved driveway, side windows, and dense tree coverage near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and a more open yard area with fewer trees.
description_view_3: Side/rear view with a clear look at the stepped upper story, multiple windows, and surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a flat paved path, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
